map_coverage: {done} ea {total} litoropo tse hlahlobiloeng ho fihlela joale - tse ling kaofela li eketsoa letsatsi le letsatsi.
cur_so_far: {year} ho fihlela joale (ho {day} {month}): {v} °C ka karolelano, {d} °C vs 1961-1990 e bolela matsatsi a tšoanang a selemo.
cmp_hint: Mokokotlo o mong le o mong ke boemo ba toropo boo ba selemo le selemo khahlano le motheo oa eona oa 1961-1990, kahoo libaka tse nang le maemo a leholimo a fapaneng li bapisoa hantle.
kpi_rate: Sekhahla sa ho futhumala ha lefatše
kpi_since: Ho futhumala ha lefatše ho tloha ka 1940
kpi_warmest: Selemo se futhumetseng ka ho fetisisa (karolelano ea lefatše)
sum_season: Sehla se futhumetseng haholo mona: {season} ({v} °C ka lilemo tse leshome).
sum_month: Khoeli e futhumetseng haholo mona: {month} ({v} °C ka lilemo tse leshome).
grid_alias_note: Rekote ea mocheso e baloa ka ~ 11 km ea seleng ea data ea boemo ba leholimo. {alias} e arolelana sele ea eona le {city}, kahoo ka bobeli li bontša nalane e tšoanang ea 1940.
qv_nodata: Ha ho na lintlha tsa toropo ena.
guide_title: ℹ️ Mokhoa oa ho bala lichate tsena
guide_body:
• Dots / bar: boleng ba selemo se seng le se seng.
  • Bold colour curve: LOESS boreleli: mokhoa oa lehae, o sa kobeheng, kahoo o ka bona sekhahla se fetohang ka mor'a nako (e.g. ~1985).
  • Dashed line: mokhoa o otlolohileng oa robust (Theil-Sen); moepa oa eona ke setšoantšo sa "leshome ka leng" tšōmong.
  • p<0.05 / n.s.: Bohlokoa ba Mann-Kendall: hore na mokhoa ona ke oa nnete ho latela lipalo-palo kapa e kanna ea ba lerata (n.s. = ha e bohlokoa). Hangata mocheso o bohlokoa haholo; pula hangata ha e na.
  • Shaded band: pale e felletseng ea nalane ho theosa le lilemo bakeng sa khoeli eo.
  • Mebala ea Heatmap mocheso o futhumetseng (blue blue → batang ba buluu); bala kholomo ho tloha tlase ho ea holimo ho bona khoeli eo e fetoha ho theosa le lilemo.
threshold_title: Matsatsi a chesang le a leqhoa ka selemo, {name}
yearly_title: Mocheso oa selemo le selemo ho theosa le lilemo, {name}
anomaly_title: Mocheso o sa tloaelehang oa selemo, {name}
vs_full: khahlano le kakaretso ea nako e felletseng ({base:.1f} °C)
heatmap_title: Mocheso o tloaelehileng oa khoeli le khoeli ka selemo, {name}
subtitle: {start}-{end} · {days} matsatsi · e futhumetseng {wy} ({wv:.1f} °C), e batang ka ho fetesisa {cy} ({cv:.1f} °C)
card_mean: E bolela mocheso oa letsatsi le letsatsi
card_coldest: Selemo se batang ka ho fetisisa
analog_line: Ka 2050, boemo ba leholimo ba lehae bo ne bo ka ikutloa joaloka {analog} kajeno, ka mocheso oa +{d} °C.
analog_past: Ka 1940, boemo ba leholimo ba lehae bo ne bo utloahala joaloka {analog} kajeno, bo batang ka {d} °C.
cap_yearly: Moelelo oa selemo o nang le LOESS boreleli (e bonts'a ho potlakisa) le mokhoa o matla oa Theil-Sen +bohlokoa
cap_anomalies: Selemo se seng le se seng ha ho bapisoa le karolelano ea 1961-1990: mekoallo e khubelu e futhumetseng, e putsoa e pholileng. Ho fetoha ho tloha ho boputsoa haholo ho ea ho bofubelu haholo ke ho futhumala.
cap_heatmap: Kakaretso ea khoeli e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe ea selemo se seng le se seng e le marang-rang a mebala (2 °C lihlopha). Bala kholomo ho ea holimo ho shebella khoeli eo e futhumetse ho theosa le lilemo tse mashome.
cap_anom_heatmap: Letlapa le ts'oanang, empa khoeli e 'ngoe le e' ngoe e lekantsoe khahlanong le 1961-1990 ea eona e tloaelehileng, kahoo phetoho e bonts'a (mofuthu o mofubelu ho feta tloaelo, pholileng e putsoa), potoloho ea selemo e tlositsoe.
cap_threshold: Matsatsi a selemo le selemo ka holimo ho 18 °C (ho chesa) le ka tlase ho 0 °C (a leqhoa). Mekhoa e 'meli e matla ea ho tšela e bolela matsatsi a chesang hona joale a feta matsatsi a leqhoa.
hint: Tobetsa kae kapa kae kapa tobetsa Esc ho koala
intro: Litoropo tse kholo tsa lefats'e li futhumetse joang ho tloha 1940: litlaleho tsa mocheso oa letsatsi le letsatsi ho tsoa ho tlhahlobo ea boemo ba leholimo ea ERA5.
omni_ph: Batla toropo, naha, sebaka kapa sebaka sefe kapa sefe
range_title: Boemo ba mocheso oa khoeli le khoeli ho theosa le lilemo, {name}
range_ylabel: Mocheso o tloaelehileng oa khoeli le khoeli (°C)
cap_range: Khoeli e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe ea bonyane bo ka holimo ho lilemo, le selemo sa morao-rao. Na ke ho haka moeli o mofuthu?
record_title: Rekoto ea khoeli le khoeli e phahameng / e tlase mocheso oa letsatsi le letsatsi, {name}
cap_records: Rekoto ea khoeli le khoeli ea nako eohle letsatsi le letsatsi holimo le tlase, ka maemo a feteletseng a selemo sa morao-rao
volatility_title: Ho fetoha ha mocheso oa letsatsi le letsatsi ka selemo, {name}
volatility_ylabel: Matsatsi ka ho tlola ho hoholo
cap_volatility: Ke hangata hakae ho etsahalang ho tlola ho hoholo ha mocheso oa letsatsi le letsatsi selemo le selemo (≥6 °C), ho fetoha ha mocheso
cap_precip: Kakaretso ea pula ea selemo le selemo (metsi a pula le lehloa) ka mokhoa o itseng
cap_stripes: Mothalo o mong le o mong ke mocheso oa selemo se le seng: boputsoa bo pholileng, bo bofubelu bo futhumala ho feta karolelano ea 1961-1990. Ho hoholeha ho tloha boputsoa ho ea ho bofubelu ke ho futhumala, ho se letho leo u ka le balang haese 'mala.
season_title: Bolelele ba nako e ntseng e hola, {name}
season_ylabel: Bolelele ba nako ea ho hola (matsatsi)
cap_season: Bolelele ba nako ea ho hola ka mocheso selemo se seng le se seng (ho matha ha matsatsi ka karolelano ea letsatsi le letsatsi ≥ 5 °C): temo ea lifensetere e se nang serame e itšetlehile ka, ho lelefatsa ha boemo ba leholimo bo futhumala.
dtr_title: Mocheso oa mocheso oa letsatsi le letsatsi (motšehare - bosiu), {name}
dtr_ylabel: Bophahamo ba letsatsi le letsatsi − min (°C)
cap_dtr: Karolelano ea lekhalo pakeng tsa letsatsi le leng le le leng holimo le tlaase. Sebaka se ntseng se fokotseha ke monoana oa sethopo: masiu a futhumala ka potlako ho feta matsatsi; e atolohang e ka supa ho omisa.
seasonshift_title: Kamoo potoloho ea sehla e fetohileng kateng, {name}
seasonshift_ylabel: Mocheso o tloaelehileng oa khoeli le khoeli (°C)
cap_seasonshift: Kakaretso ea selemo bakeng sa selemo sa pele khahlano le lilemo tse leshome tse fetileng tsa rekoto. Lekhalo pakeng tsa likhahla khoeli le khoeli le bontša hore na ke likarolo life tsa selemo tse futhumala haholo (hangata mariha ho feta lehlabula).
health_heading: Lipontšo tsa phello ea bophelo bo botle
health_sub: Mokhoa oa ho futhumala o ka holimo o fetoha maemo a tsebahalang a mocheso, serame le liketsahalo tse feteletseng. Chate ka 'ngoe e hlaha moo data eo e e hlokang e leng teng.
degreedays_title: Matsatsi a ho futhumatsa le ho pholisa, {name}
cap_degreedays: Moroalo oa selemo le selemo oa boiketlo ba mocheso: tlhoko ea ho futhumatsa (ka tlase ho 18 °C) e theoha ha tlhoko ea ho pholisa (ka holimo ho 22 °C) e phahama, moemeli oa ho pepesehela serame le tlhokahalo ea moea.
heatwave_title: Matsatsi a maqhubu a mocheso ka selemo, {name}
heatwave_ylabel: Matsatsi a maqhubu a mocheso ka selemo
cap_heatwave: Matsatsi a leqhubu la mocheso: ho matha ha matsatsi a ≥3 ka letsatsi le letsatsi le phahameng ka holimo ho 1961-1990 90th percentile. Mocheso o sa khaotseng oa motšehare ke sesosa se ka sehloohong sa ho shoa ho feteletseng ha maqhubu a mocheso.
cap_tropic: Bosiu ha mocheso o le ka holimo ho 20 °C, kahoo 'mele ha o fumane phomolo ka bosiu bo le bong, e leng mokhanni ea ka sehloohong, ea atisang ho hlokomolohuoa lefu le bakoang ke mocheso.
cap_coldspell: Matsatsi a serame: ho matha ha matsatsi a ≥3 ka tlase letsatsi le letsatsi ka tlase ho 1961-1990 10th percentile. Ho bata ka nako e telele ho baka mafu a feteletseng a pelo le methapo ea mali nakong ea mariha.
heavyrain_title: Matsatsi a lipula tsa litloebelele ka selemo, {name}
cap_heavyrain: Matsatsi ao bonyane a nang le pula ea limilimithara tse 20 (ETCCDI R20mm), lipula tsa likhohola tse bakang likotsi, phalliso le mafu a bakoang ke metsi.
heatindex_title: Matsatsi a kotsi a index ea mocheso ka selemo, {name}
cap_heatindex: Matsatsi ao mocheso o bonahalang (index ea mocheso, e phuthoang ka mongobo) o fihla maemong a khatello ea mocheso, ho sebelisoa likeletso tsa mocheso oa sechaba. E hloka pokello ea lintlha tsa mocheso o hlakileng.
footer: E hlahisitsoe {date} · data ho tsoa ho Open-Meteo reanalysis ea nalane (ERA5) · mohloli ho GitHub
qv_baseline: Kakaretso ea lilemo tse leshome khahlano le motheo oa 1961-1990
qv_chart_alt: Ho futhumala ha lilemo-leshome, ho tletse chate ea sebaka
